title: PM Work Write API Surface Projects
objective: Implement the first bounded PM/work write-side runtime surface for work.projects by authoring project create/update schemas, POST and PATCH endpoints, org-backed validation, and focused regression coverage without changing database schema or opening work-package write APIs.
constrained_outputs: ProjectCreate and ProjectUpdate request schemas bounded to the existing work.projects contract
POST and PATCH work-project endpoints with org-backed validation and clear error behavior
Focused service-layer logic and tests covering valid and invalid project writes
No database-schema changes and no work-package or broader PM mutation surface
validation_steps: Confirm packet 011f implements write endpoints only for work.projects and does not open work_package or other PM mutation surfaces
Confirm create and update paths validate required org foreign keys against the now-active org domain and reject invalid references cleanly
Confirm the existing packet-010b read surface and packet-011e ORM alignment remain intact after the write-side additions
Confirm no SQL or schema changes are made and packet 011f remains fully runtime-bounded
sql_permission_note: Packet 011f is application-runtime write-surface work only. No new SQL, schema changes, or migration edits are authorized.
